name: archive-room-phase-5

checklist.summary: User replied `continue`, confirming Archive Room Phase 5 checklist can proceed to todolist creation. Confirmation covers project maintenance eligibility, event-triggered maintenance, startup/daily gap-filling inspections, important chat maintenance, pending confirmation routing, maintenance activity visibility, Phase 1-4 regression, and Phase 6/7 boundaries.

tested.summary: Phase 5 implementation was self-tested with automated tests, local live smoke, and real-data MCP/P2P validation. User accepted the phase after review.

done.summary: User said `phase5应该没什么问题了，验收通过`, confirming Archive Room Phase 5 is accepted.

notes: Child requirement created for Archive Room Phase 5 after Phase 4 acceptance.
Product clarification completed before creation: Phase 5 prioritizes human-facing archive completeness while also serving AI handoff readiness.

Maintenance eligibility is a new project-level product attribute. Defaults follow project status; active/ongoing projects are maintained, completed/paused/archived/inactive projects are not maintained unless explicitly overridden.
Maintenance-off projects skip startup/daily inspection and low-value events, but high-value events still trigger archive maintenance.
High-value events include task completion/failure, project status change, important artifact, blocker, conflict reminder, and meeting conclusion.
Startup and daily inspections are gap-filling checks only for maintained projects. No-update inspections update latest inspection time without noisy maintenance records.
Important messages marked by users enter a pending maintenance queue and are summarized by the archive manager before becoming archive entries.
Phase 5 excludes Phase 6 AI context query/onboarding API and Phase 7 confirmation governance polish.
Checklist confirmed by user reply `continue`; todolist created from confirmed checklist.

Implemented Phase 5 project archive maintenance eligibility, event-triggered archive maintenance, startup/daily inspections, important message intake, maintenance activity records, source references, pending confirmation routing basics, and Archive Room maintenance controls.

Automated self-test passed: tests/test_archive_room_phase_5.py, tests/test_archive_room_phase_1_3.py, tests/test_archive_room_phase_4.py, tests/test_meeting_for_ai_phase1.py, tests/test_meeting_for_ai_phase4.py, tests/test_project_execution.py, python compile check for app/server.py and app/project_store.py, and node --check app/archive-room.js.

Live smoke passed on service started through ./start.sh at http://localhost:8160: maintained temporary project fb6db40e-4c32-4e62-9609-e62a5406d17b was included in forced daily inspection and a marked important message created an important_message archive entry.

Real-data MCP/P2P validation passed on project 7692ca8b-2d88-44cf-9dbb-765f2e4eb855 (金融分析项目): archive maintenance was enabled, forced daily inspection updated lastDailyInspectionAt, a marked important message created an important_message entry with chat source reference, and codex-local to archive-manager communication was recorded in VO history under codex__archive-manager__phase5-real-data-mcp.

P2P reply landed in history after roughly 31 seconds; the synchronous smoke script used a 30 second HTTP timeout and timed out locally, so future acceptance checks should either use a larger timeout or verify the reply through communication history.
2026-06-20T16:49:40+08:00 User accepted Phase 5 with: phase5应该没什么问题了，验收通过.
